changelog: Skill Tree - sequential lesson unlocking with Duolingo-style path
XP Levels 1-100 with level names (Novice to Mythic)
Friend System - add friends, compare streaks and XP
Daily Quests - 5 quests per day with progress tracking
Spaced Repetition - wrong words return more often
Boss Levels - every 10 lessons, 10 hard questions, 80% needed
Weekly Challenges - learn words, complete lessons, earn XP
AI Tutor - explanations for wrong answers
Flying coin animations on correct answers
